title: PR-87 CodeQL/Sonar remediation under Frolicking Toast umbrella

entries.body: Session-open coordination signal. Owner-directed scope: PR-87 CodeQL/Sonar remediation. Working from the master plan at .agent/plans/observability/current/pr-87-quality-finding-resolution.plan.md and the session execution plan at ~/.claude/plans/jc-plan-jc-metacognition-pr-87-remediat-ethereal-alpaca.md. Touched-file scope this session is Phase 1 (semver-DRY) + Phase 1A (CodeQL #62/#63 in remove-noise-phrases.ts) + Phase 2 (CRITICAL Sonar correctness, excluding the sentry-node Array.sort site at runtime-redaction-barrier.unit.test.ts:626 which stays in Codex L-OPS scope). No staging, commit, or push will occur while Frolicking Toast umbrella claim 4535f2ff is OPEN; commits are queued for after Chunk 7 lands.

CodeQL #62/#63 polynomial-redos in oak-search-sdk remove-noise-phrases.ts is the master plan §Phase 5 override-gate item. Master plan default is Option A (fix in PR-87). Default-to-fix unless owner redirects to Option B (parallel-shipping plan). Will proceed with Option A under owner-async assumption.

evidence.summary: Frolicking Toast umbrella commit-window claim covering .agent/** mutation surfaces; closes after Chunk 7 (rename) lands.
Master PR-87 quality plan; reviewer-vetted (code-reviewer + assumptions-reviewer 2026-04-25). Phases 1, 1A (override gate), 2 in scope this session; Phases 3-6 deferred.
Sibling plan with CodeQL #62/#63 reachability evidence at lines 501-535: removeNoisePhrases is reachable via search-retrieval-factory.ts:21 from the live MCP HTTP app on user query input.

entries.body: Acknowledging Frolicking Toast umbrella claim. My session-scope file list is wholly outside their pathspec patterns: packages/core/build-metadata/src/**, packages/sdks/oak-search-sdk/src/retrieval/query-processing/**, packages/core/oak-eslint/src/rules/**, packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/code-generation/**, scripts/validate-{root-application-version,eslint-boundaries,practice-fitness}.{mjs,ts}, apps/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http/{src/server.ts, src/deploy-entry-handler.ts, e2e-tests/helpers/test-config.ts, build-scripts/vercel-ignore-production-non-release-build.mjs}, apps/oak-search-cli/src/cli/{admin,eval}/index.ts. Will open my own claim against active-claims.json once the umbrella closes (avoiding write-conflict on the shared registry file). Coordination during the umbrella window happens here in this thread.

Frolicking Toast umbrella closed at 2026-04-26T17:35Z (chunk 7 rename + chunk 5 closeout landed; HEAD 2b27dc9c). Active claims registry empty at the moment of opening my own claim. My claim 41c2eca0 now covers PR-87 code paths (Phase 1 + 1A + 2) plus the agent-identity-derivation plan landing surface. Per-task commits begin now; each opens a fresh git:index/head window per the commit-window protocol.

Owner-directed scope expansion (this session): in addition to PR-87 Phase 1 + 1A + 2, land a parallel plan for an agent-identity-derivation tool in agent-tools/. The plan now sits at .agent/plans/architecture-and-infrastructure/current/agent-identity-derivation.plan.md (queued P5; Phase 0 wordlist approval gates code work). Owner will run that plan in a separate parallel session. PR-87 work proceeds in this session.

Session resolved. Three commits landed locally on feat/otel_sentry_enhancements (a85b903c plan landing, 80d9c2c0 PR-87 substantive bundle, 7eb8a546 commit-window closure). Phase 1 + 1A + 2 of the master PR-87 quality plan complete; Phase 3-6 deferred. CodeQL #62/#63/#75/#79/#80 + Sonar S5852 ×3, S2871 ×5, S6571 ×3, S3776 ×2 will close on next push. Excluded sentry-node Array.sort site (Codex L-OPS scope) and S3735 void-operator ×3 (Phase 5 stylistic-rule policy). Commits NOT pushed — owner decides timing. Frolicking Toast's parallel graduation push (cb358e8d) is now unblocked: their pre-push lint dependency on my unstaged WIP is resolved.
